overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a vibrant summer meadow filled with wildflowers, following a winding dirt path through varying terrain from open grassland to rocky enclosed sections, ultimately approaching a small village with tents in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with wildflowers and tall bushes

events.description: character emerges from dense bushes onto open dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through tall grass and bushes, moving onto a dirt path

entered.detail: Dense green shrubs and tall grass surrounding the character initially
Red poppy-like wildflowers scattered in the grass
Purple lavender-like wildflowers in the meadow
Winding dirt trail through the meadow
Dense line of trees marking the forest boundary in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Geralt standing in dense tall grass and bushes, then walking forward onto a dirt path through a vibrant meadow filled with red and purple wildflowers. The camera follows from behind as the character emerges from the vegetation onto the open trail with a forest tree line visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with scattered trees and distant mountains

events.description: path curves gently to the left as the character continues walking

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through open grassland

entered.detail: Individual oak trees scattered across the meadow on the right side
Mountain range visible on the horizon
Small rocky formation visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the dirt path through an open meadow with scattered oak trees on the right and distant mountains becoming visible on the left. The path curves gently as wildflowers dot the grassland, and the dense bushes from the previous section fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed trail with rock walls and dense foliage

events.description: trail becomes narrower and more enclosed with rock formations on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a narrower section of path flanked by rocks and dense vegetation

entered.detail: Large rocky outcrop and boulders lining the left side of the path
Thick bushes and trees creating a wall of greenery on the right
Low stone wall or rocky embankment on the right side

segments.scene_description: The path narrows and becomes more enclosed as Geralt walks between a large rock formation on the left and dense foliage on the right. The trail winds through this rockier section with the mountains now visible ahead, creating a more confined corridor compared to the open meadow.

events.description: village with tents comes into view in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward a distant village, approaching the settlement

entered.detail: Cluster of tents and temporary structures marking a small village or camp
Wooden buildings and camp installations in the settlement

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up again as Geralt approaches a village with tents and wooden structures visible in the distance. The rocky enclosure gives way to open grassland with the settlement becoming progressively more prominent as the character walks toward it, with mountains framing the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded thicket through a vibrant meadow that eventually leads to a distant village settlement. It begins with Geralt emerging from dense tall grass and bushes onto a dirt path carpeted with red and purple wildflowers, with a distant forest tree line framing the horizon. As he continues forward, the environment expands into an open grassland dotted with scattered oak trees, while the dense vegetation falls away to reveal mountains appearing on the left. The scene then shifts as the path narrows into a confined corridor, winding between a large rock formation and thick foliage before the terrain opens up once more. Finally, the rocky enclosure gives way to wide grasslands as the camera follows Geralt toward a village of tents and wooden structures set against the backdrop of the mountains.
